case_title: LOUIS ZHANG VS. GARY IN IAO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT - LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZHANG, LOUIS
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZHANG, LOUIS AS TO DEFENDANT IAO, GARY IN SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT IAO, GARY IN
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZHANG, LOUIS SERVED APR-04-2006, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT IAO, GARY IN
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT IAO, GARY IN
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $16.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZHANG, LOUIS
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT IAO, GARY IN
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, AS TO DEFENDANT IAO, GARY IN

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZHANG, LOUIS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT IAO, GARY IN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2483 16TH AVE. S.F. CA. 94116, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
